# resultsAllowingPartial(_:)

**Instance Method**

Returns results from a query synchronously.

## Declaration

```swift
func resultsAllowingPartial(_ inAllowPartialResults: Bool) throws -> [Any]
```

## Parameters

- **inAllowPartialResults**: If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], only immediately available results are returned; otherwise, the function waits until all results are available.

## Return Value

The results of the query in an array of `ODRecord` objects.
